description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a clean, rectangular layout and a minimalist aesthetic. The front includes a driveway leading to a covered garage, a manicured lawn, and a pathway to the main entrance. Large sliding glass doors and windows provide ample natural light and connect the interior living spaces to the backyard garden. The backyard is enclosed with greenery and includes a patio area, while mature trees are positioned at both the front and rear corners of the property. The exterior is predominantly white with subtle gray accents, and the landscaping is well-maintained with flower beds and hedges. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and functional simplicity.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and landscaped front and back gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, manicured lawn, and front garden with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and the depth of the backyard with a tree at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, large sliding glass doors, and rear garden with trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side windows, and the open backyard area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large sliding glass doors and grouped side windows
